title: Better Ghast Harness
description: When I first saw the Happy Ghast harness, I immediately hated it. So to make it look more like a vanilla item and less like something from the Marketplace, I overhauled it!
body:
**THIS RESOURCE PACK IS NOT TO BE REUPLOADED BY ITSELF ANYWHERE BY ANYONE EXCEPT MidniteDemolisher.**

---
**This resource pack may be included in modpacks to be distributed! Please do not remove my credit.**

---
Is the new ghast's harness too mod-like in appearance for you? The second I saw it, I was bent on changing it. Problem is, I'm a hard-core Programmer Art user who never touches the default texture pack, and I spent about 3 hours overhauling the harness in default style - which I'll never use XD So I bring it to Modrinth for those that would like to use it!
![A vanilla textured happy ghast in the early morning sunrise with an upscaled and overhauled harness.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54deec5541be19aae85fc5597ce46bc23616953d_0.webp)

### NEW TEXTURE FEATURES:
- Four individual saddles instead of one giant aviator cap
- Smaller blankets under each saddle as opposed to that giant curtain
- All colors colorpicked from the original texture so it matches the default look
- Straps that go all the way around the ghast's body so it won't look like the saddle (and you and your friends by proxy) will fall off
- BONUS: The ghastling's inner texture now matches soul fire! They're found in soulsand valleys and the red was making my skin crawl, so two birds with one stone!



**Hate the updated ghast texture? Don't like the goggles? Want more options? Programmer Art and Default (1.14) versions with goggles can be found on my Modrinth page, and versions without the goggles can be found on my [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/midnitedemolisher/projects)! Modrinth doesn't allow multiple different files under one project, and I would have 9 different projects if I uploaded all the versions here, which is too much for one single thing for me XD**

---
![A happy ghast in the current style with my harness overhaul, without goggles.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8128496b5ec284d8f9190e555332bb5c32c8dcf_0.webp)

**Remember to place the pack ABOVE the Default (or Programmer Art) packs. It will warn you that the pack was made for a newer version, but it will work!**

---
![Image showing the pack order, with Better Ghast Harness activated above Programmer Art and Default.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bbfc2ff763a41a29544720c5fb6a65fa8804f08.png)
